temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) In a dimly lit, wet parking garage at night, a man in a dark suit gets out of a vintage, cream-colored sedan. The camera follows him as he closes the car door, with the sound of shattering glass echoing in the quiet space. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a mysterious and tense mood, introducing a character arriving at a clandestine location.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A dramatic, orchestral score begins with a high-pitched, tense string note. The distinct sound of a car door closing and glass shattering is heard.)
(00:04-00:07) Two men, both dressed in dark suits and ties, walk with purpose across a wet, reflective surface. The man on the left carries a briefcase, and the man on the right holds a flashlight, illuminating their path as they walk away from the camera. (Storyline: The scene introduces two key characters, suggesting they are on a mission or heading towards a significant event. The flashlight and briefcase imply a professional or criminal context.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The dramatic, suspenseful orchestral music continues, building tension.)
